attributes.label: Gene biotype
attributes.description: Biotypes of genes annotated in Ensembl
synonyms: A gene or transcript classification such as "protein coding" and "lincRNA". Definition of gene biotypes is described here.

attributes.label: Chromosome
attributes.description: The chromosome where a gene is located
synonyms: The chromosome on which each human gene is located.

attributes.label: # of paralogs
attributes.description: The number of paralogs calculated based on HomoloGene

attributes.label: Ortholog existence
attributes.description: Ortholog existence for each human gene in other organisms defined by HomoloGene

attributes.label: Evolutionary divergence
attributes.description: The most distant organisms from human that have orthologous genes in HomoloGene

attributes.label: Biological process
attributes.description: Functional annotations (GO terms) derived from the Biological process category of Gene Ontology, which GOA has assigned to each human gene with evidence information

attributes.label: Cellular component
attributes.description: Functional annotations (GO terms) derived from the Cellular component category of Gene Ontology, which GOA has assigned to each human gene with evidence information

attributes.label: Molecular function
attributes.description: Functional annotations (GO terms) derived from the Molecular function category of Gene Ontology, which GOA has assigned to each human gene with evidence information

attributes.label: Tissue-specific high expression (RefEx GeneChip)
attributes.description: Tissues in which a gene was tissue-specific highly expressed in 34 tissues of RefEx(GeneChip microarray)
keywords: Calculations for tissue specificity of genechip human GSE7307 from RefEx
synonyms: Calculations for tissue specificity of genechip human GSE7307 from RefEx
sourceLabels: Calculations for tissue specificity of genechip human GSE7307 from RefEx

attributes.label: Tissue-specific low expression (RefEx GeneChip)
attributes.description: Tissues in which a gene was tissue-specific lowly expressed in 34 tissues of RefEx(GeneChip microarray)
keywords: Calculations for tissue specificity of genechip human GSE7307 from RefEx
synonyms: Calculations for tissue specificity of genechip human GSE7307 from RefEx
sourceLabels: Calculations for tissue specificity of genechip human GSE7307 from RefEx

attributes.label: Tissue-specific high expression (GTEx)
attributes.description: Tissues in which a gene is tissue-specific highly expressed in 49 tissues of GTEx V6

attributes.label: No expression in tissues (GTEx)
attributes.description: Tissues in which expression of a gene is not detected in 53 tissues of GTEx V8

attributes.label: Tissue-specific high expression (HPA)
attributes.description: Tissues in which expression specificity of a gene is evaluated as "Tissue enriched", "Tissue enhanced", or "Group enriched" by Human Protein Atlas
keywords: HPA (Data from the Human Protein Atlas in tab-separated format)
synonyms: HPA (Data from the Human Protein Atlas in tab-separated format)
sourceLabels: HPA (Data from the Human Protein Atlas in tab-separated format)

attributes.label: Cell type-specific high expression (HPA)
attributes.description: Cell types in which expression specificity of a gene is evaluated as "Cell type enriched", "Cell type enhanced", or "Group enriched" by Human Protein Atlas
keywords: HPA (Data from the Human Protein Atlas in tab-separated format)
synonyms: HPA (Data from the Human Protein Atlas in tab-separated format)
sourceLabels: HPA (Data from the Human Protein Atlas in tab-separated format)

attributes.label: Transcript biotype
attributes.description: Transcript classification annotated in Ensembl

attributes.label: Transcript length
attributes.description: Transcript length (bp) based on Ensembl

attributes.label: UniProtKB sections
attributes.description: Protein sections consisting of manually annotated UniProtKB/Swiss-Prot and automatically annotated UniProtKB/TrEMBL

attributes.label: Protein domains
attributes.description: Protein domains from UniProt
keywords: For details about UniProt Keywords, see UniProt documentation.

attributes.label: Biological process
attributes.description: Gene ontology biological process annotation from UniProt

synonyms: Gene ontology biological process annotation from UniProt
sourceLabels: Gene ontology biological process annotation from UniProt

attributes.description: Gene ontology cellular component annotation from UniProt

sourceLabels: Gene ontology cellular component annotation from UniProt

attributes.label: Molecular function
attributes.description: Gene ontology molecular function annotation from UniProt

synonyms: Gene ontology molecular function annotation from UniProt
sourceLabels: Gene ontology molecular function annotation from UniProt

attributes.label: Isoform specific go existence
attributes.description: GO classification of proteins with isoform-specific GO annotations from UniProt

attributes.label: Ligands
attributes.description: Ligand bindings from UniProt
keywords: For details about UniProt Keywords, see UniProt documentation.

attributes.label: Molecular mass
attributes.description: Molecular mass from UniProt

attributes.label: PTMs
attributes.description: Post-translational modifications from UniProt
keywords: For details about UniProt Keywords, see UniProt documentation.

attributes.label: Catalytic activity
attributes.description: Classification by catalytic activity, based on the Enzyme Committee (EC) number

attributes.label: # of transmembrane domains
attributes.description: The number of transmembrane segments from UniProt

attributes.label: # of phosphorylation sites
attributes.description: The number of phosphorylation sites from UniProt

attributes.label: # of glycosylation sites
attributes.description: The number of glycosylation sites from UniProt

attributes.label: Disease-related proteins
attributes.description: Disease-related proteins from UniProt
keywords: For details about UniProt Keywords, see UniProt documentation.

attributes.label: Tissues w/expression reported
attributes.description: Classification based on the name of the tissue from which the clone was isolated in the reference describing the protein sequence in Tissue section from UniProt

attributes.label: Evidence of existence
attributes.description: Protein existence obtained from neXtProt

attributes.label: Isoform specific interaction existence
attributes.description: Proteins with isoform-specific PPI annotations from UniProt

attributes.label: Pathway annotation
attributes.description: Classification by reaction, based on Uniprot pathways

attributes.label: Structure data existence
attributes.description: Uniprot entries with links to PDB data entries
keywords: Uniprot entries with links to PDB data entries
This item based on the data of March, 2021 of uniprot (human only).

attributes.label: Rate of helical regions
attributes.description: Rate of helical regions in each entry of UniProt

attributes.label: Rate of beta strand regions
attributes.description: Rate of beta strand regions in each entry of UniProt

attributes.label: # of turn structures
attributes.description: Number of turn structures from UniProt

attributes.label: # of disulfide bonds
attributes.description: Number of disulfide bounds from UniProt

attributes.label: Rate of disorder regions
attributes.description: Rate of disorder regions in each entry of UniProt

attributes.label: # of peptides in a PDB entry
attributes.description: The number of peptides in a PDB entry
keywords: Number of peptides contained in one PDB entry
This item based on the data of January 20, 2021 of PDBj.
The latest data can be obtained from the URL below. https://data.pdbj.org/pdbjplus/data/pdb/rdf/

attributes.label: Analysis methods
attributes.description: Structure determination methods in PDB
keywords: Experimental methods used for 3D structure acquisition in the PDB entry.
This item based on the data of January 20, 2021 of PDBj.
The latest data can be obtained from the URL below. https://data.pdbj.org/pdbjplus/data/pdb/rdf/

attributes.label: Proteins in pathway
attributes.description: The number of proteins in each pathway from Reactome
keywords: This item based on the data of Reactome Version 71 (02, December 2019).
The latest data can be obtained from the URL below. https://reactome.org/download-data

attributes.label: Compounds in pathway
attributes.description: The number of chemical compounds in each pathway from Reactome
keywords: Reactome-classified pathways for each chemical compound
This item based on the data of Reactome Version 71 (02, December 2019).
The latest data can be obtained from the URL below. https://reactome.org/download-data

attributes.label: # of interacting proteins
attributes.description: The number of interacting proteins from UniProt
keywords: The number of interacting proteins from UniProt
This item based on the data of March, 2021 of UniProt (human only).

attributes.label: ChEMBL assay existence
attributes.description: Proteins with or without ChEMBL assay from Uniprot
keywords: Proteins with or without ChEMBL assay from UniProt
Target protein from ChEMBL-RDF against all UniProt entries
synonyms: Target protein from ChEMBL-RDF against all UniProt entries
sourceLabels: Target protein from ChEMBL-RDF against all UniProt entries

attributes.label: Chemical role
attributes.description: Chemical roles in ChEBI

attributes.label: Application type
attributes.description: Application types in ChEBI

attributes.label: Action type
attributes.description: Mechanism action types in ChEMBL

attributes.label: Biological role
attributes.description: Biological roles in ChEBI

attributes.label: Drug indication
attributes.description: Number of drugs with indications (disease or symptom) categorized in MeSH hierarchy

attributes.label: Max drug development phase
attributes.description: Classification based on the max development phase (research stage, phase I-III, and post-launch) of drugs from ChEMBL

attributes.label: PubChem ATC classification
attributes.description: Anatomical Therapeutic Chemical (ATC) Classification in PubChem
keywords: Data for nodes linked to ChEMBL or ChEBI retrieved from https://integbio.jp/rdf/dataset/pubchem

attributes.label: ChEMBL ATC classification
attributes.description: Anatomical Therapeutic Chemical (ATC) Classification in ChEMBL

attributes.label: Molecular mass of glycans
attributes.description: Molecular weight of glycans from GlyCosmos

attributes.label: Tissues
attributes.description: Tissues where glycans are expressed

attributes.label: Subsumption
attributes.description: The relationship between four levels of glycan types registered in GlyCosmos. For details, see the Help page of GlyCosmos.

attributes.label: Diseases in Mondo
attributes.description: Disease or disorder categories in the Mondo Disease Ontology (Mondo)

attributes.label: Diseases in MeSH
attributes.description: Disease categories in Medical Subject Headings (MeSH)

attributes.label: Diseases in NANDO
attributes.description: Japanese intractable disease categories in the Nanbyo Disease Ontology (NANDO)

attributes.label: Cross referenced disease DBs in Mondo
attributes.description: Number of entries linked to Mondo in each of approx. 70 disease related databases from database cross reference in Mondo

attributes.label: Phenotypic abnormality
attributes.description: Phenotypic abnormality categories of the Human Phenotype Ontology (HPO)

attributes.label: Mode of inheritance
attributes.description: Classification of the Mode of inheritance in Human Phenotype Ontology (HPO)

attributes.label: GWAS
attributes.description: Classification of statistically significant variants in genome-wide association studies (GWAS) based on associated traits. Obtained from GWAS catalog via TogoVar

attributes.label: Clinical significance
attributes.description: Variant clinical significance from TogoVar
keywords: TogoVar (limited to variants with frequency data in Japanese populations)
